stemHtml: What is the duration of a typical chemical oxygen system?

options.a: 60 to 120 minutes, and it is controlled by a valve control mechanism, depending on the settings in the cockpit.
options.b: 12 to 20 minutes, and it can be deactivated by stowing the passenger masks.
options.c: 60 to 120 minutes, and it cannot be turned off once activated.
options.d: 12 to 20 minutes, and it cannot be turned off once activated.
